name: danieljwonder/nostr-for-wp
description: Two-way synchronization between WordPress content and Nostr protocol.

suggest.ext-sodium: Used to encrypt the NIP-46 client key and bunker URI at rest (bundled with PHP 7.2+)
suggest.ext-gmp: Speeds up secp256k1 arithmetic used by the NIP-46 remote signer client (bcmath works as fallback)
